text:
6 PRs merged today. The main event was the gpt-image-2 infrastructure dance — we tried spreading it across 5 Azure regions before just switching to OpenAI direct. Sometimes the simplest route wins.

Also shipped: first-class OpenClaw integration, smoothed out some API edge cases (no more 500s for empty transcriptions), and updated the app submission protocol. It's now a little clearer how to hit that Flower tier. 🌸

Code is open. PRs welcome.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #softwareengineering #webdev
